notes: Arcaea is a pioneering synthetic biology company focused on creating next-generation beauty ingredients through precision fermentation and genetic engineering. Their technology platform enables the production of entirely new bioactive molecules with unprecedented performance characteristics. Arcaea represents the cutting edge of the biotech beauty ingredient revolution, working with leading beauty brands to develop proprietary actives. Previously known as Bloomsbury Genetic Therapies' beauty division, Arcaea has emerged as a dedicated beauty biotech company with a compelling vision for transforming cosmetic ingredient discovery.

Arcaea represents the cutting edge of the biotech beauty ingredient revolution, working with leading beauty brands to develop proprietary actives.

Arcaea (formerly known as Bloomsbury Genetic Therapies' beauty division) is a pioneering synthetic biology company focused on creating next-generation beauty ingredients through precision fermentation and genetic engineering. Their technology platform enables the production of entirely new bioactive molecules with unprecedented performance characteristics. Arcaea represents the cutting edge of the biotech beauty ingredient revolution, working with leading beauty brands to develop proprietary actives that cannot be produced through conventional chemistry.
